column12: BPS, Umur Harapan Hidup [Metode Baru, SP2020 long-form basis], statistics table 2206

column12: GSO/NSO Statistical Yearbook of Viet Nam 2024, Table 43 (province level)

column12: India SRS Abridged Life Tables 2019-23, Statement 3 (Office of the Registrar General)
column13: STATE proxy: Maharashtra (rural+urban, both sexes) — India publishes no city life tables.

column12: World Bank SP.DYN.LE00.IN — United Arab Emirates
column13: COUNTRY proxy (UAE national figure), same treatment as Dubai; SCAD unreachable this session and archived SCAD pages carry no life-expectancy figure.

column12: Shanghai Statistical Yearbook 2023, Table 2.1 (Shanghai Municipal Bureau of Statistics)
column13: Registered (hukou) population basis. 2022 was depressed by Shanghai's COVID mortality spike (2021 in the same table: 84.11); later yearbook editions dropped the column and the health commission site was unreachable, so 2022 is the newest verifiable official figure. Official statistic; independent verification not possible.

column12: Beijing municipal government data page (2024 health white-paper figure), beijing.gov.cn
column13: Municipal figure, 82.51 in 2023. A Nov 2025 official press conference announced 83.93 for 2024, but the transcript states no population basis and the +1.4y jump suggests a series change, so the white-paper series value is recorded and the announcement noted. Official statistic; independent verification not possible.

column12: Shenzhen Residents' Health White Paper 2022 (Shenzhen Municipal Health Commission)
column13: Municipal figure (83.93). The 2023-edition white paper publishes no updated life expectancy, so 2022 remains the latest official figure. Official statistic; independent verification not possible.

column12: India SRS Abridged Life Tables 2019-23, Statement 3 (Office of the Registrar General)
column13: NCT of Delhi (the state IS the city-region), rural+urban, both sexes.

column12: data.gov.sg d_5257cff1ee5e6a16db6a9606a983efa4, DataSeries 'Doctors Per 10,000 Total Population', 2024 = 29
column13: Derived: 29 per 10,000 / 10 = 2.9 per 1,000. Source series is integer-rounded (29), so derived value carries ~±0.05 rounding. Whole-country value; Singapore is a city-state.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA JPD13 'Tokyo' (TL3), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2024
column13: Tokyo prefecture (TL3). Parent Southern-Kanto TL2 (JPD) = 2.58 in 2024.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA DK01 'Capital Region of Denmark' (TL2), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2023
column13: Metro/region proxy (Hovedstaden), not city proper. Cross-checked exactly vs Eurostat hlth_rs_physreg DK01 2023 = 578.71 per 100k.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA CH04 'Zurich' (TL2, canton), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2024
column13: Canton of Zurich; TL3 CH040 is identical (5.67, 2024).

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA AT13 'Vienna' (TL2, city-state), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2024
column13: City-state, true city level. Eurostat AT13 2024 shows 721.02 per 100k (7.21) — minor vintage difference; 2023 matches exactly (7.05 both sources). High density partly reflects hospitals serving the surrounding region.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA KR011 'Seoul' (TL3), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2025
column13: Seoul Special City (TL3). Parent Capital Region TL2 (KR01) = 2.94 in 2025.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA AU2GM 'Greater Melbourne' (TL3), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2024

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA NL32 'North Holland' (TL2), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2023
column13: Province proxy (Noord-Holland), not city proper; no TL3 physician data. Cross-checked exactly vs Eurostat NL32 2023 = 489.08 per 100k.

column12: NHS Workforce Statistics Sep 2025 (HCHS doctors, London region Y56, headcount 34,136) + General Practice Workforce Sep 2025 (GPs excl. locums 7,266) / ONS mid-2024 London population 9,089,736 x 1000
column13: Replicates OECD's documented UK methodology (headcount at 30 Sep, retainers in, locums out, NHS staff only) at London-region level; private-only doctors excluded — non-trivial in London. England check by same method: 3.63 vs OECD-published UK 3.4 (earlier year). Fills the gap left by the OECD regional series (Greater London ends 2016).

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA US36 'New York' (TL2, state), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2022
column13: New York State proxy, not NYC; no finer OECD geography with data. Series has a level break around 2019 (2018=3.51, 2019=4.46) suggesting a source-method change.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA FR101 'Paris' (TL3, departement), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2025
column13: Paris departement = city proper. Core density is inflated by hospital/physician concentration serving the metro: Ile-de-France TL2 = 3.87 (2025). Counts physicians by place of work, not residence of patients.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA CA35 'Ontario' (TL2, province), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2024
column13: Ontario province proxy, not Toronto; no finer OECD geography with data.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA DE3 'Berlin' (TL2, city-state), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2019
column13: City-state, true city level, but 2019 vintage — TL2 series ends 2019. TL3 DE300 runs to 2024 but was rejected as non-comparable (2024=1.76; German TL3 national mean 1.54 vs TL2-consistent ~4-5, indicating it covers only

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA ES51 'Catalonia' (TL2), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2024
column13: Catalonia region proxy; TL3 ES511 Barcelona province exists but ends in 2011. Eurostat ES51 2023 (412.15 per 100k = 4.12) matches OECD 2023 exactly.

column12: DHA 'Dubai Health Statistical Annual Book 2022', Table 48 p.267 'Physicians (1000 Pop.)' = 3.35 (2022); also stated in narrative p.256
column13: Official DHA-stated rate; licensed physicians in the emirate (licence counts may include some non-practising). Newer DHA yearbooks (2023: 13,228 physicians; 2024: 14,861) publish only headcounts, no per-1,000 rate.

column12: OECD DF_HEALTH, REF_AREA US06 'California' (TL2, state), DOC per 1,000 inhabitants, 2022
column13: California state proxy, not San Francisco; no finer OECD geography with data. Same 2019 level break as other US states (2018=2.60, 2019=3.15).
TL2 SE11 identical (4.91, 2023). County = metro proxy.

Oslo municipality/county = city proper; core density reads high (parent TL2 NO08 Oslo and Viken = 5.22 in 2024), same pattern as Paris FR101 in v1.0. Series dipped 7.59 (2022) to 6.67 (2023) then 6.80 (2024).
TL3 = TL2 FI1B (same region, whole Uusimaa). Finnish series ends 2021 - older vintage than most cities in this wave.

Community of Madrid. TL3 ES300 exists but ends 2011 - rejected as stale (same rule v1.0 applied to Barcelona ES511). Spanish series volatile recently (2022=5.11, 2023=5.45, 2024=6.18); Catalonia shows the same pattern an
Region proxy - Italy has no TL3 physician data in this flow.
Region proxy - Italy has no TL3 physician data in this flow.

German TL2 in this flow = the 16 Laender only (no Oberbayern DE21), so Bavaria is the finest comparable geography; a large-state proxy. TL2 series ends 2019 (same vintage as v1.0 Berlin). TL3 DE212 Muenchen Kreisfreie St
Land proxy; TL2 series ends 2019. TL3 DE712 Frankfurt am Main Kreisfreie Stadt (1.83, 2024) rejected as non-comparable subset series (see Munich note).
City-state = true city level, but 2019 vintage (German TL2 series ends 2019, as with v1.0 Berlin). TL3 DE600 (1.86, 2024) rejected as non-comparable subset series.
TL3 = TL2 BE1 Brussels Capital Region (identical, 4.44 in 2023). City-region, true city level.

column12: OECD Regional Health database (dataflow OECD.CFE.EDS/DSD_REG_HEALTH@DF_HEALTH v2.5), measure DOC 'Active physicians', unit 10P3HB 'Per 1 000 inhabitants'; supplemented by data.gov.sg MOH 'Health Personnel (Per 10,000 Total Population)' for Singapore and Dubai Health Authority 'Dubai Health Statistical Annual Book 2022' for Dubai; cross-checked against Eurostat hlth_rs_physreg
column13: Ireland has NO TL2/TL3 physician data in this flow - only country level (CTRY IRL: 4.09 in 2025). Left null per the TL3/TL2 convention; using the national figure would require a Country-proxy dataLevel decision by the ma
TL3 = TL2 PT1A (identical). NUTS2024 Grande Lisboa geography; series only spans 2021-2024. Reads high - capital-region concentration.
City = region (TL2 CZ01 identical). True city level; capital core density reads high, like Paris/Vienna in v1.0.

Metro region chosen over city-core PL911 (11.12, 2023), which sits on a source-side 2023 reporting-definition break (Eurostat-confirmed jump 8.36->11.12); PL91 2024 has no break and matches the Metro data level.
Istanbul province = TL2 TR10 (identical). Province is close to the metro.
Province proxy, not Montreal - Canada has no TL3 in this flow (same convention as v1.0 Toronto = Ontario CA35).
Province proxy, not Vancouver - Canada has no TL3 in this flow.
State proxy per v1.0 US convention (no finer OECD geography). US series has a level break around 2019 (2018=2.68, 2019=3.36) noted in v1.0.
State proxy per v1.0 US convention. Same 2019 level break (2018=4.24, 2019=5.39).
State proxy per v1.0 US convention - identical series and value as v1.0 San Francisco (California 2022=3.02).
Washington state proxy per v1.0 US convention. Same 2019 level break (2018=2.54, 2019=3.05).

DC is its own TL2 'state' - a small urban core district, so density reads extremely high (physicians counted at workplace serving the whole metro), like Paris FR101 in v1.0 but stronger. Series breaks: 9.07 (2009) to 6.8
Greater Sydney metro (TL3), exactly matching v1.0 Melbourne convention (AU2GM). Parent TL2 AU1 New South Wales = 4.32 in 2024.
Auckland region; TL3 = TL2 NZ12 (identical). New Zealand series ends 2019 - oldest vintage in this wave alongside German Laender.
Osaka prefecture (TL3), matching v1.0 Tokyo convention (JPD13). Parent TL2 JPG Kansai region = 2.96 in 2024. Japanese physician survey is biennial (2020, 2022, 2024).
Tel Aviv District - Israel has TL2 districts only in this flow (no TL3). District is a reasonable metro-core proxy; national ISR = 3.50 in 2023.

column12: Computed: 16,533 registered doctors / 7.5241M mid-2024 population, both from 'Health Facts of Hong Kong 2025' (Department of Health)
column13: Doctors ON THE REGISTER (not necessarily practising), excludes dentists and Chinese-medicine practitioners — narrower than the mainland definition. DoH's own printed ratio 1:456 ≈ 2.19 per 1,000.

column12: Taiwan MOHW 2024 medical-institution annual report, Table 29: 47.6 Western-medicine physicians per 10,000, Taipei City
column13: Practising WESTERN-MEDICINE physicians only (TCM and dentists published separately), counted at place of practice over registered population — inflated by patients commuting from the wider metro (like DC/Paris cores).

column12: MOPH Thailand, Report on Health Resources 2024, Table 11: population per doctor = 428 in Bangkok
column13: CITY level (all affiliations incl. private). Denominator is the registered mid-year population; Bangkok's service population is larger and its doctors serve patients nationwide. Thailand national comparator: 0.59 per 1,000 (WHO, 2023).

column12: WHO GHO HWF_0001 — Malaysia: 22.72 medical doctors per 10,000
column13: COUNTRY proxy (no state-level density published).

column13: COUNTRY proxy.

column12: WHO GHO HWF_0001 — United Arab Emirates: 29.92 per 10,000 (latest)
column13: COUNTRY proxy (SCAD emirate-level figure not fetchable this session).

column12: Shanghai Statistical Yearbook 2025, Table 21.1: 38 licensed (assistant) physicians per 10,000
column13: Yearbook publishes the ratio as an integer per 10,000 (coarse). Chinese 执业(助理)医师 includes clinical, TCM, stomatology and public-health physicians — broader than OECD 'practising'. Official statistic; independent verification not possible.

column12: 2025 Beijing health development statistical communiqué (Beijing Municipal Health Commission)
column13: Per 1,000 RESIDENT population. Reads high partly because Beijing's national-level hospitals serve patients from across China (place-of-practice basis, like Washington DC). Broad Chinese physician definition (incl. TCM etc.). Official statistic; independent verification not possible.

column12: Computed: 54,296 licensed (assistant) physicians (Guangdong Statistical Yearbook 2025, Table 21-4) / 17.99M year-end resident population (Table 3-7)
column13: Exact division of two published official numbers. Cross-check: the city's own 2023 white paper states 2.86 per 1,000 at end-2023. Broad Chinese physician definition. Official statistic; independent verification not possible.

column13: ADM1 Bangkok (Thailand > Bangkok) = the BMA city province - NOT the tiny Bangkok Noi district from the naive match. River/Urban Medium, Coastal High, Heat High.

column12: ThinkHazard division #37366 'Kuala Lumpur' — river Low, urban High, coastal No Data, heat Medium
column13: ADM2 Kuala Lumpur (Malaysia > Kuala Lumpur > Kuala Lumpur) = the federal-territory city; ADM1 (1894) is identical. Coastal No Data at both levels (city is ~35 km inland) - max over 3 available; Urban flood High drives the score.

column12: ThinkHazard division #1516 'Dki Jakarta' — river High, urban High, coastal High, heat Medium
column13: ADM1 DKI Jakarta (Indonesia > Dki Jakarta) = the capital city province (the ADM2s are its kota sub-cities). River/Urban/Coastal all High.

column12: ThinkHazard division #24210 'Metropolitan Manila' — river Low, urban Medium, coastal High, heat Medium
column13: ADM2 Metropolitan Manila (Philippines > NCR) = the metro city. Coastal High drives the score.

column12: ThinkHazard division #3352 'Ho Chi Minh City' — river High, urban High, coastal High, heat Medium
column13: ADM1 Ho Chi Minh City (Vietnam > Ho Chi Minh City) = the city province. River/Urban/Coastal all High.

column12: ThinkHazard division #70184 'Mumbai city' — river Very low, urban Low, coastal High, heat High
column13: ADM2 Mumbai city district (India > Maharashtra); the alternative Mumbai Suburban (70183) yields the same max. Coastal High + Heat High.

column12: ThinkHazard division #3173 'Abu Dhabi' — river Low, urban Low, coastal High, heat High
column13: ADM1 emirate of Abu Dhabi (UAE > Abu Dhabi) containing the city (emirate is large but city-relevant classes: Coastal High, Heat High).

column12: ThinkHazard division #13242 'Shanghai' — river Low, urban Low, coastal High, heat High
column13: ADM2 Shanghai (China > Shanghai Shi) = the urban core; ADM1 municipality (922) has identical four classes. Coastal High + Heat High.

column12: ThinkHazard division #899 'Beijing Shi' — river High, urban Low, coastal No Data, heat High
column13: ADM1 Beijing municipality (China > Beijing Shi) = the city. Coastal No Data (inland) - max over 3 available; River High + Heat High drive the score.

column12: ThinkHazard division #13030 'Shenzhen' — river Very low, urban High, coastal High, heat High
column13: ADM2 Shenzhen (China > Guangdong Sheng) = the city. Urban/Coastal/Heat all High.

column12: ThinkHazard division #17633 'Delhi' — river High, urban High, coastal No Data, heat High
column13: ADM2 Delhi (India > Delhi > Delhi) = the city; ADM1 NCT (1489) is identical. Coastal No Data (inland) - max over 3 available; River/Urban/Heat all High.

Copenhagen 5 + suburbs Bagsvaerd (Novo Nordisk), Ballerup, Hedehusene (Rockwool), Humlebaek (Coloplast), Lyngby.

Zurich 11 + lake suburbs Kilchberg, Staefa, Herrliberg, Rapperswil-Jona + Amcor (Forbes: city Zurich, country UK - counted where Forbes places the city). Canton Zug cluster (Holcim, Glencore, Sika, Partners Group, Coca-Cola HBC, Sandoz) and Schindellegi (Kuehne+Nagel) excluded: Zug is its own FUA, not Zurich metro.
Forbes city 'Vienna, Austria' only (8). Vienna VA firms go to Washington DC.
Seoul Capital Area: Seoul 43 + Seongnam 5 + Incheon ('Inchon') 2 + Yongin 2 + Suwon 1 + Icheon (SK Hynix) 1.
Melbourne 6 + Docklands 3 (ANZ etc.) + Clayton 1. Bendigo excluded (separate city).

Amsterdam 11 + metro Hoofddorp, Zaandam, Diemen, Almere, Hilversum + STMicroelectronics (Forbes: city Schiphol = Haarlemmermeer, Amsterdam metro; country field says Switzerland - ambiguous, counted per Forbes city). Rotterdam/The Hague/Utrecht/Eindhoven excluded.

London 44 + commuter belt Windsor 2 (Centrica, IHG), Uxbridge, Slough, Weybridge, Chertsey, Woking, Welwyn Garden City, Reigate, Luton, Basildon + Beazley (country listed Ireland, city London) + AngloGold Ashanti (country South Africa, city Staines-upon-Thames, Surrey). Vodafone (Newbury) and AstraZeneca (Cambridge) excluded as outside commuter belt.

Ile-de-France: Paris 26 + 18 petite/grande-couronne communes (Courbevoie, Issy, Velizy, Boulogne-Billancourt, Nanterre, Neuilly, Saint-Ouen, Tremblay etc.). Clermont-Ferrand (Michelin) and Limoges excluded.
GTA: Toronto 25 + Aurora (Magna) + Vaughan + Woodbridge.
Forbes city 'Berlin' only (2).
Forbes city 'Barcelona' only (1).
Forbes city 'Dubai' only (5). Ras Al-Khaimah excluded.

Nvidia/Intel, Sunnyvale 3, Palo Alto 3, Mountain View 2, Cupertino/Apple, Milpitas, Los Gatos/Netflix) + Seagate (Irish-domiciled, Forbes city Fremont = Fremont CA). Keysight (Santa Rosa) NOT absorbed: Sonoma County
Stockholm 17 + Sundbyberg, Kista, Solna, Nacka + Evolution Gaming ('Stockhold' typo fixed). SSAB row carries bogus state 'Alberta' but city Stockholm - counted. Gothenburg/Lund excluded.
Oslo 3 + Fornebu (Aker BP) + Lysaker (Baerum suburbs). Kongsberg excluded (separate labour market).
Helsinki 6 + Espoo 4 - all 10 Finnish Global-2000 firms.
Madrid 11 + Majadahonda (Bankinter). Bilbao/Valencia/A Coruna (Inditex) excluded.
Milan 9 + San Donato Milanese (Saipem) + Basiglio. Turin/Bologna excluded.
Forbes city 'Rome' only (6).
Munich 9 + Garching.
Frankfurt 4 + Bad Homburg (Fresenius). Darmstadt (Merck KGaA) excluded - separate OECD FUA, consistent with established rule.
Forbes city 'Hamburg' only (2).
Forbes city 'Brussels' only (6). AB InBev (Leuven) excluded - Leuven is a separate FUA under the established metro rule; borderline case, noted.

Dublin 13 + Swords (Ryanair, Trane Technologies). Lisbon 3. Porto excluded.
Forbes city 'Prague' (1, CEZ).
Warsaw 4. Plock (Orlen) excluded (outside Warsaw metro).
Istanbul 9 + Umraniye (an Istanbul district) 1.
Montreal 7 + Laval 2 + boroughs Saint-Laurent, Verdun.
Forbes city 'Vancouver, Canada' (4).

Moline (Deere) excluded (Quad Cities).

Eversource (Springfield MA) excluded - Springfield is its own CSA.

Deckers (Goleta/Santa Barbara) excluded.

Jakarta 11 + Tangerang 1 (Jabodetabek).
Metro Manila: Manila 1 + Makati 4 (two Forbes spellings 'Makati'/'Makati City') + Pasay + Pasig.
HCMC 1. Hanoi firms (7, two spellings 'Ha Noi'/'Hanoi') are not HCMC.
Mumbai 32 + Thane 1 (MMR). Pune (6) excluded - separate metro.
Forbes city 'Abu Dhabi' (9).
Forbes city 'Shanghai' (35). Suzhou excluded (separate prefecture-level city).
Beijing 78 + CITIC (Forbes country Hong Kong, city Beijing - counted where Forbes places the city). Langfang excluded. Feasibility count 78; +1 is CITIC.
